step_rationale: Endothelial signaling and dysfunction marker; inhibits platelet activation.
mechanism: Nitric oxide produced by endothelial cells regulates vasodilation and suppresses platelet adhesion; reduced bioavailability reflects endothelial dysfunction and predisposes to thrombosis.
